)6Nr
z3A simple command-line interface for tarfile module.)
descriptionz
-vz	--verbose
store_trueFz
Verbose output)
action
default
helpz
--filterz
<filtername>z
Filter for extraction)
metavar
choicesrE
requiredz
--list
	<tarfile>z
Show listing of a tarfile)
-ez	--extract
<output_dir>z
Extract tarfile into target dir)
nargsrF
--create)
<name>z
<file>z
Create tarfile from sourcesz
--testz
Test if a tarfile is validr#
z&--filter is only valid for extraction

{!r} is not a tar archive.
{!r} file is extracted.z+{!r} file is extracted into {!r} directory.r
